meta.title: Yaa dhakhtarkaygii bedelka ah? | Hel dhakhtarkaaga bedelka ah isla markiiba
meta.description: Geli magaca jidkaaga oo isla markiiba arag dhakhtarkaas aad booqan karto markii dhakhtarkaagu maqan yahay. Bilaash bukaanka.

home.heroHighlight: Halkan ka hel dhakhtarkaaga bedelka ah.
home.heroSubtitle: Raadi xaruntaada dhakhtarka oo arag dhakhtarka maanta shaqaynaya.
home.step1Text: Qor magaca xaruntaada dhakhtarka ama isticmaal goobta.
home.step2Text: Isla markiiba arag xarunta maanta shaqaynaysa.
home.step3Text: Waxaad isla markiiba haysataa ciwaanka iyo taleefanka saxda ah.
home.regionsDescription: {count} xarumo dhakhtarka oo ka qaybgalaya {cities} {citiesLabel}. Dooro magaaladaada si aad u aragto dhammaan xarumaha.
home.locationTitle: Xarumaha u dhow ma la tuso?
home.locationDesc: Waxaan isticmaalnaa goobta si aan kuugu tusno dhakhtarrada ugu dhow. Goobta waxay ku hadhaysaa qalabkaaga.
home.locationInaccurate: Goobtaadu waa mid aan saxnayn si loo tuso xarumaha u dhow. Ku raadi magaca ama boostada.
home.locationNone: Xarun kuu dhow lama helin. Ku raadi magaca ama boostada.
home.locationDeniedHelp: Riix astaamaha 🔒 qufulka ee ku ag yaal URL-ka →
home.searchSuffix: Ama ku raadi magaca xarunta kor.
home.nearbyCount: {count} {label} oo kuu dhow — riix si aad u doorato

praktijk.waarnemerDesc: Markii dhakhtarkaagu maqan yahay, waxaad booqan kartaa bedelka soo socda:

footer.description: Si dhakhso ah u hel xarunta dhakhtarka ee shaqaynaysa markii dhakhtarkaagu maqan yahay.
footer.disclaimer: Fiiro gaar ah: haddii aad shaki qabtid, had iyo jeer si toos ah ula xiriir xaruntaada dhakhtarka ama bedelka. Xaalada degdegga ah, wac <emergency>112</emergency> ama <postTitle>adeegga dhakhtarka nasashada</postTitle> aagaaga.

aanmelden.claimDesc: Raadi xaruntaada oo ku sheeg 30 ilbiriqsi gudahood.

portaal.loginDesc: Soo gal si aad u maamusho bogga xaruntaada.

hapBanner.message: Cabashooyin degdeg ah oo sugi karin? Wac adeegga dhakhtarka nasashada aagaaga.
hapBanner.generic: Wac dhakhtarkaaga — jawaab celinta ayaa ku siinaysa lambarka saxda ah.
hapBanner.emergency: Xaalada degdegga ah had iyo jeer wac 112
